summary: QR Lead Capture System fully tested. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: public form, admin page, QR code dialog, search/date filters, Excel export, stats cards.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (pre-existing from iteration 10)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/qr-leads: Public endpoint works correctly, validates all fields, 10-digit mobile validation, stores in qr_leads collection
GET /api/admin/qr-leads: Admin endpoint requires auth, returns leads with total and today_count, supports search/date filters
QRLeadForm.jsx: Mobile-responsive, FieldFlow Pro branding, all fields with validation, success message on submit
AdminQRLeads.jsx: Stats cards (Total/Today), search filter, date filters, Excel export, QR code dialog with download
Sidebar: QR Leads menu item present with QrCode icon
seed_data_creation: Created 9 test leads via backend tests (TEST_ prefixed). Pre-existing: Rahul Kumar (Mumbai), Priya Singh (Delhi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR Lead Capture System fully functional. Public form at /qr-lead-form works without login. Admin page at /admin/qr-leads shows 11 leads with all filters working. QR code dialog shows correct URL (https://cre-remarks.preview.emergentagent.com/qr-lead-form) with download functionality. Excel export triggers file download. Vehicle types: '< 160cc' and '≥ 160cc'. Timestamps in IST.

verifications: FieldFlow Pro branding + Customer Registration header
All fields present: Name, Mobile, City, State, Vehicle Type
Success screen: Thank You message displayed
Stats cards: Total Leads (11), Today's Leads (11), Source (QR)
Table columns: Name, Mobile, City, State, Vehicle Type, Date & Time
Date filter: date_from and date_to inputs work
Excel export: Button enabled, triggers download
Show QR Code button: Opens dialog
Dialog opens on Show QR Code click
Download QR Code button present and functional
QR Leads menu item present in admin sidebar
Active state highlighted when on page
POST /api/qr-leads: Accepts mobile with country code
